description.ko: 긴장감 있는 흑백 타이밍 다이얼이 날카로운 기하학 리듬으로 균열되며, 수학적 질서와 빠른 글리치 불안정성을 균형 있게 드러낸다.
description.en: A tense monochrome timing dial fractures into sharp geometric rhythms, balancing mathematical order with fast glitch instability.

prompt: KURO-X artwork titled "Blade Clock Desync": a black and white geometric abstraction arranged as a fractured radial timing dial, with concentric rings of #1A1A1A angular wedges, #FFFFFF knife-thin gaps, and #808080 / #C0C0C0 tick marks snapping out of alignment. The image feels like a corrupted mechanical clock seen through a malfunctioning monochrome display: serrated arcs are staggered by tiny frame jumps, triangular hands repeat as ghosted hard-edge echoes, and narrow scanlines vibrate across every layer. Medium-density square particles and clipped rectangular data crumbs orbit the center in fast motion, while stepped halftone noise, broken registration marks, and harsh black-white contrast create dense monochrome complexity. No figure, no landscape, only precise mathematical order under intense glitch pressure, sharp angles, crisp vector geometry, and a balanced yet unstable circular composition.
